text:
Once upon a time, in a small village nestled between groves of glittering silver birches, there lived a fox named Fluffles. Fluffles had a heart as playful as his appetite for marvellous things. Every morning, after he chased away the nocturnal owls with a knack for distracting them with his endless chatter, Fluffles embarked on expeditions into the heart of the forest.

One chilly spring day, Fluffles crossed paths with a peculiar owl named Owlet. Owlet wore a sparkling cloak like no other, and instead of feathers, it was filled with shimmering pebbles. The two struck up an instant friendship.

After days filled with joyous tales and many laughter-filled adventures, Fluffles discovered something astonishing. During the midsummer solstice, when the forest came alive with laughter and song, Owlet possessed a gift. With a flutter of its wings, Owlet could reveal anything hidden in shadows. But it only used this power once every year.

That year
